Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x41DF "RAMBO-41DF" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rambo - First Blood Part II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Dump starts at $0334 as there is some code between this and $0400 which is used during the game.
